final:
module top_module(
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [3:0] count_out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count_out <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            count_out <= count_out + 1;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count_out <= count_out - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
